case_title: FLOURIAN RASCO VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO(MAXINE ANDERSON,

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY RASCO, FLOURIAN AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO(MAXINE ANDERSON, AGENT) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-17-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF RASCO, FLOURIAN AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO(MAXINE ANDERSON, AGENT)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-15-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO(MAXINE ANDERSON, AGENT)
CORRESPONDENCE FROM THE CITY ATTORNEY'S RE SERVICE.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
